But I found out that there is a plant called "Arundo donax", but there is one more similar plant "Arundo donax var. distorsa", however "Arundarbor distorta" seems to be incorrect.

Arundo donax, also known as Arundo donax var. distorsa, is a type of cane or bamboo. It is a perennial, flowering plant that has been used for medicinal and health-promoting purposes.

The health benefits of Arundo donax include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis. 

The bioactive constituents of Arundo donax include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Arundo donax include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate respiratory issues.
